gaps: No existing test case covers the User Guides screen at all. All 15 provided test cases focus on: splash screen theming (65293009), onboarding/EULA screens (65293010-65293034), location permission flows (65293012-65293022), and Find My Device scenarios. None test the User Guides screen content, device listing, or sub-device filtering logic.

Missing test: User Guides screen should only display devices that are actually connected/paired to the app, not phantom sub-devices like 'Charge Stand' which is not a standalone audio device but an accessory.
Missing test: User Guides screen device list filtering logic — verifying that only valid Poly audio products (headsets, speakerphones, earbuds) appear and accessories/chargers are excluded.

Missing test: User Guides screen data source validation — confirming the device list is populated from the correct source (connected devices list vs. a static/hardcoded list that may contain stale entries).
Missing test: User Guides screen refresh behavior when devices connect/disconnect — does the list update dynamically or retain stale sub-devices?

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-001: User Guides Screen — Only Connected Devices Displayed (No Phantom Sub-Devices)
steps: Precondition: Pair and connect exactly one valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ earbuds). Ensure no 'Charge Stand' or other accessory is connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Observe the list of devices shown on the User Guides screen.
Note: The connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) MUST appear.
Verify that NO entry for 'Charge Stand' or any non-audio accessory appears in the list.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen displays only the connected Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+). 'Charge Stand' is NOT listed. Actual (If Bug): 'Charge Stand' or other phantom sub-device incorrectly appears as a selectable entry, indicating stale/hardcoded data source.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-002: User Guides Screen — No Devices Connected Shows Empty or Appropriate State
steps: Precondition: Ensure no Poly device is paired/connected to the phone. Bluetooth may be ON but no device bonded.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Observe the User Guides screen content.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen shows an empty state message (e.g., 'No connected devices' or 'Connect a device to view guides'). No device entries are listed. Actual (If Bug): A stale device or phantom sub-device like 'Charge Stand' appears despite no device being connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-003: User Guides Screen — Dynamic Refresh When Device Connects (From Empty State)
steps: Precondition: No Poly device connected. User Guides screen is open showing empty state.
Pair and connect a valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
Observe the User Guides screen without navigating away.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen dynamically updates to show the newly connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) within 5 seconds. No manual refresh or navigation away is required. Actual (If Bug): Screen remains empty or shows stale data until user navigates away and back.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-004: User Guides Screen — Dynamic Refresh When Device Disconnects
steps: Precondition: One valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is connected. User Guides screen is open showing that device.
Disconnect the device (turn off device Bluetooth or put it out of range).
Observe the User Guides screen without navigating away.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen dynamically removes the disconnected device entry within 10 seconds, transitioning to empty state if no other devices remain. Actual (If Bug): Disconnected device entry persists on screen, indicating stale list not tied to live connection state.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-005: User Guides Screen — Multiple Connected Devices All Displayed Correctly
steps: Precondition: Pair and connect two valid Poly audio devices simultaneously (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ earbuds and a Poly speakerphone). Ensure no accessory/charger is connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Observe the list of devices.
generated_testcases.expected: Both connected Poly audio devices appear in the User Guides list. No phantom entries (e.g., 'Charge Stand') appear. Each entry corresponds to a valid, connected audio product. Actual (If Bug): Only one device appears, or an accessory/charger appears as a third entry.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-006: User Guides Screen — App Force-Kill and Re-Launch Retains Correct Device List
steps: Precondition: One valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Verify the connected device appears.
Force-kill the app (swipe from recents).
Re-launch the app.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen displays the same connected device (Voyager Free 60+). No phantom sub-devices appear. Actual (If Bug): Device list is empty after relaunch, or stale/phantom entries reappear from a cached/hardcoded source.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-007: User Guides Screen — Device Disconnect Then Reconnect (State Transition)
steps: Precondition: One valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Verify the device appears.
Disconnect the device (turn off Bluetooth).
Verify User Guides transitions to empty state (no devices).
Reconnect the device (turn on Bluetooth, wait for auto-reconnect).
Observe User Guides screen.
generated_testcases.expected: After disconnect: User Guides shows empty state. After reconnect: User Guides dynamically shows the device again within 10 seconds. No phantom entries appear at any point. Actual (If Bug): Device entry persists during disconnect, or fails to reappear after reconnect.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-008: User Guides Screen — Data Source Validation (Connected Devices API vs. Static List)
steps: Precondition: Connect a valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Note the device name displayed.
Navigate to: App → Device screen and verify the same device name is shown there.
Compare the device name in User Guides with the device name in the main Device screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The device name in User Guides exactly matches the device name shown in the main Device screen (same source of truth). Actual (If Bug): User Guides shows a different name, a generic name, or a hardcoded entry that does not match the connected device's actual name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-009: User Guides Screen — Bluetooth OFF State
steps: Precondition: Bluetooth is turned OFF on the phone. No device connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Observe the screen.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen shows appropriate empty/offline state (e.g., 'Enable Bluetooth and connect a device'). No device entries, phantom or otherwise, are displayed. Actual (If Bug): A stale device or 'Charge Stand' appears despite Bluetooth being OFF.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-010: User Guides Screen — App Backgrounding During Device List Display
steps: Precondition: One valid Poly audio device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is connected.
Navigate to: App → Settings → User Guides
Verify the device appears.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 30 seconds.
Reopen the app from recents.
Observe User Guides screen.
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides screen still displays the connected device correctly after app is backgrounded and resumed. No phantom entries appear. Actual (If Bug): Screen goes blank, shows stale data, or phantom sub-devices appear after resume.
